# Cabazitaxel 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Cabazitaxel 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Cabazitaxel</strong> 目前有 <strong>19 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Cabazitaxel 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Jevtana in combination with prednisone or prednisolone is indicated for the treatment of patients with hormone-refractory metastatic prostate cancer previously treated with a docetaxel-containing...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>female breast carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>sickle cell-hemoglobin d disease syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>hereditary persistence of fetal hemoglobin-sickle cell disease syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>sickle cell-beta-thalassemia disease syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>sickle cell-hemoglobin c disease syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>sickle cell-hemoglobin E disease syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>HIV infectious disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>hyperthyroidism（99.8%）</li>
<li>neuroblastoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（99.7%）</li>
<li>collagenopathy（99.7%）</li>
<li>lymphocytic hypereosinophilic syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（99.7%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（99.7%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（99.7%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>resistance to thyroid hormone due to a mutation in thyroid hormone receptor beta（99.7%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（99.7%）</li>
<li>retroperitoneal neoplasm（99.6%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（99.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/cabazitaxel/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
